title: mentha × piperita var. pimentum
intro: Mentha × piperita var. pimentum, also known as peppermint, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is a natural cross between water mint (Mentha aquatica) and spearmint (Mentha spicata). The medicinal properties of peppermint include its ability to ease digestive issues and provide relief from nausea and headaches due to its menthol and menthone content. The health benefits of peppermint include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues such as congestion and coughs, as well as providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of peppermint often come in the form of teas, capsules, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), menstrual cramps, and other health concerns.
